title: Unlit Fires
description: Adds an unlit state to campfire items, making them more realistic.
body:
# | DESCRIPTION | Adds an unlit variant to campfires and soul fire items. Crafted campfires will be unlit. You can light them with a flint and steel and put them out with a shovel. Mining the campfire with silk touch will preserve its state. Note: Campfires from other sources, like trading and creative mode, will be lit. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21.4-1.21.11```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any datapack modifying the loot table or crafting recipe of the campfire. The texture can be changed in items/campfire_unlit and items/soul_campfire_unlit. # | OTHER CREATORS' PACKS | I know there are other packs that do this same thing, and may even use the same (or very similar) texture. I developed this without inspiration from these, and used vanilla features and avoided the use of functions.
### Here are the 2 datapacks I found that had this idea first: [Nice Campfires by NiceRon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-campfires)
[Unlit Campfire Placement by boyonk](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unlit-campfire-placement) ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
